Navigation one Navigation two Navigation three

Density fallback article

This article body intentionally avoids semantic main or article tags so the reader mode fallback must locate the densest content container instead of copying the entire page shell. The main copy should keep this paragraph and ignore the surrounding navigation rail.

A second paragraph adds enough visible text to make the candidate score stable. It also reflects the real world case where many documentation or CMS pages render primary content in a generic div with only a class name such as story content or post body.
